**Prakriti Sattva**

**53 Premium AI Reels \- Final Enhanced Scripts & Production Guide**

*Nature's Intelligence, Bottled.*

Prepared for Prakriti Sattva | Enhanced by Yuvabe Studios

# **Executive Enhancement Summary**

·       All 53 reels have been rewritten and standardised for a minimum 20-second execution window, with VISUAL reels at 22-26 seconds, TEXT reels at 24-28 seconds, and VO reels at 26-30 seconds.  
·       Hooks have been upgraded from descriptive lines to Instagram-native emotional, sensory, and save-worthy statements.  
·       Voiceovers have been rewritten to sound like a calm Ayurvedic practitioner rather than a commercial narrator, with claim-safe language.  
·       Captions have been cleaned for premium tone, SEO clarity, lower-case hashtags, softer CTAs, and compliance-friendly language.  
·       Visual directions have been retained from the original production plan but refined for AI generation: texture realism, product label clarity, shallow depth of field, slow movement, and final still holds.  
·       Music and sound notes are now consistent: restrained instrumental direction, natural room tone, and minimal product sound design.  
·       Potentially inconsistent or high-risk words such as cure, heal, treat, repair, prevent, and medical-style claims have been removed or softened.  
·       The overall tone has been aligned with premium Ayurvedic, handcrafted, cruelty-free, nature-derived beauty positioning.

# **Master Creative Direction**

**Brand feeling:** Premium Ayurvedic, handcrafted, cruelty-free, nature-derived, practitioner-formulated, calm, intelligent, and sensory.

**Visual benchmark:** Forest Essentials, Kama Ayurveda, Aesop, luxury spa editorials, slow beauty films, and tactile product photography.

**Editing rhythm:** Slow reveal, sensory close-up, one educational or emotional insight, then a clean product still. No fast cuts, bounce transitions, glitch effects, or aggressive zooms.

**Text system:** Intro must be short and tension-led. Body must communicate one idea only. Outro must close with product name, Prakriti Sattva, and a soft CTA or tagline.

**Compliance:** Use helps, supports, nourishes, comforts, and designed for. Avoid cure, treat, heal, medical claims, guaranteed results, and before/after promises.

**Hashtags:** Use 3-5 lower-case hashtags. Always include \#prakritisattva.

**Disclaimer:** For product-benefit or testimonial reels, include: Not evaluated by the FDA. For external use only. Patch test recommended.

# **Final 53 Reel Scripts :**

## **\#1 Nature's Intelligence, Bottled. \[VISUAL\]**

**Final Duration:** 22-26 seconds

**Date / Category:** Jun 2, 2026 \- Tue | Post: 11 AM ET | Brand Launch | Brand launch week

**Strategic Objective:** Create product desire through tactile, cinematic, slow luxury visuals.

**AI Production Type:** Product composite \+ AI macro ingredients \+ cinematic still holds \+ subtle motion animation. Human skin/hands should look realistic, mature, elegant, and age-appropriate for a 35+ US audience when used.

### **Final Visual Script**

·       SHOT 1 \- Turmeric root, freshly split. Golden interior, side-lit on pale marble. 3s. SHOT 2 \- Single rose petal falls onto the same marble surface. Slow motion. 4s. SHOT 3 \- Amber coloured oil drop suspended mid-fall against a soft dark background. 3s. SHOT 4 \- Full product range arranged on aged linen. Warm afternoon window light from left. 8s. SHOT 5 \- Prakriti Sattva logo, cream background, centred. Tagline fades in beneath. 7s.  
Execution refinement: extend each shot slightly if needed so the reel is never below 20 seconds. Use slow macro movement, shallow depth of field, soft side light, realistic product texture, and a final 4-5 second still hold with the label sharp and readable.

### **Final On-Screen Text**

**INTRO:** "Luxury begins with formulation."

**BODY:** "Ayurveda never believed in one formula for everyone." / "Your Prakriti. Your season. Your ritual."

**OUTRO:** Prakriti Sattva  
Nature's Intelligence, Bottled.

### **Voiceover**

No voiceover. Let the product, text, music, and slow visual rhythm carry the reel.

### **Music & Sound Design**

Any instrumental music. Single plucked veena note, held \- then silence. 30s. Add subtle room tone, soft fabric movement, and one natural product sound (oil pour, spoon touch, candle ambience, or ceramic bowl) where visually relevant. Keep volume low and leave 1-2 seconds of silence before the final product hold.

### 

### **Final Caption**

Ayurvedic skincare guided by your Prakriti, your season, and your ritual. Nature-derived, handcrafted and formulated with the intelligence of traditional Ayurveda.

Discover your Prakriti \-\> Link in bio.

\#prakritisattva \#ayurvedicskincare \#slowbeauty

### **CTA \+ Thumbnail Hook**

**CTA:** Discover your skin type → prakritisattva.com

**Thumbnail Hook:** Luxury begins with formulation.

### **Internal QC Notes**

·       Minimum 20 seconds; do not cut down for speed.  
·       Final product label must be sharp and readable for at least 3-4 seconds.  
·       Keep typography small, spacious, and premium; no bold display fonts or drop shadows.  
·       Avoid medical-style visuals, exaggerated transformations, or unrealistic before/after claims.  
·       Use warm, natural skin texture and mature, elegant hands when human elements are needed.
